chunks.title: Reign and Idolatry of Manasseh
chunks.reason: Describes the reign, specific idolatrous acts, and the resulting spiritual decline of Judah under Manasseh.

chunks.title: Oracle Against Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Contains the prophetic declaration of judgment delivered by Yahweh through the prophets.

chunks.title: Manasseh's Death and Succession
chunks.reason: Details Manasseh's bloodshed, his burial, and the accession of his son Amon.

chunks.title: Reign and Death of Amon
chunks.reason: Chronicles the brief reign of Amon, his assassination, and the rise of Josiah.
